title: Convert YAML Sequence to Text List
cap_description: Convert a YAML sequence to a list of textable values
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a YAML sequence into a flat list of textable values. Use this when a downstream cap requires a plain text list but the upstream produces a YAML sequence.

## Inputs

A YAML sequence of scalar values.

## Outputs

A list of textable string values.

## Notes

- Non-string elements are converted to their string representations.
- For the reverse, use [Convert Text List to YAML Sequence](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:list;textable;yaml").
